critical_gaps.title: Legacy golden dataset requirements document not ported
critical_gaps.impact: 23+ scenarios, enrichment_index schema, YAML overrides schema, and full parity strategy absent from WorkDataHubPro

critical_gaps.title: Error-case fixtures (threshold_exceeded.xlsx, missing_column.xlsx, empty_sheet.xlsx) never created
critical_gaps.impact: Bronze-layer validation ERR-001 through ERR-004 cannot be regression-tested

critical_gaps.title: Real-data verification guide (verification_guide_real_data.md) not ported
critical_gaps.impact: Operators have no guidance for verifying fact loads, MDM sync, and snapshots against real data

critical_gaps.title: Failed-record export to CSV mechanism missing in current project
critical_gaps.impact: Debugging artifact when rows fail validation is absent; flagged in coverage matrix AI-004

critical_gaps.title: annual_award parity validation script does not exist in legacy
critical_gaps.impact: PAR-01 marked validated but annual_award parity comparison mechanism is missing

critical_gaps.title: Company ID mapping files (ID1-ID5) not tracked in WorkDataHubPro
critical_gaps.impact: Legacy overrides for company_id resolution not ported; ID5 explicitly dropped but ID1-ID4 unclear

critical_gaps.title: Validation result parity history not ported
critical_gaps.impact: Historical parity decisions and mismatch classifications unavailable for adjudication reference

critical_gaps.title: annuity_income has zero presence in WorkDataHubPro — 15 legacy items all legacy_only
critical_gaps.legacy_ref: All VA-AI-001 through VA-AI-015 items are legacy_only; WorkDataHubPro has no annuity_income source code, fixtures, replay baselines, or capability decomposition
critical_gaps.impact: annuity_income is the only unclosed first-wave domain; AI-001 through AI-005 coverage matrix rows are pending; ID5 retirement decision and 6 COMPANY_BRANCH_MAPPING overrides gap (VA-AI-015) risk being forgotten

open_questions.question: What is the decision criteria for when a domain needs an independent golden set vs. relying on replay baselines?
open_questions.source: verification-assets.md:191 states annual_award/annual_loss golden set need is unresolved

open_questions.question: What is the intake contract gap for the supplemental real-structure workbook and when will it be resolved?
What is the timeline for CT-003 (publication/delete scope parity) which is explicitly deferred?
What are the concrete implementation requirements for GOV-02 (Temp ID leakage prevention)?
When will annuity_income planning proceed and will it re-use annual_award/annual_loss patterns?
open_questions.source: AI-001 through AI-005 show annuity_income as only unclosed first-wave domain

open_questions.question: Should the verification asset manifest be a physical document or a registry?
open_questions.source: verification-assets.md notes manifest '还没有独立落地为项目内固定文档或registry'

open_questions.question: Should a parity script be created for annual_award or is the replay baseline sufficient?
open_questions.source: Legacy only has parity scripts for annuity_performance and annuity_income

open_questions.question: What is the intended relationship between cross-domain fixture copies (e.g., annual_award/annuity_performance_fixture)?
open_questions.source: Multiple references to cross-domain fixture duplication found

verification_assets_md: VA-AP-011 (legacy golden dataset requirements) should be added to verification-assets.md as legacy-only asset
VA-AL-002 (error-case fixtures) should be flagged as 'planned but not created'
MECH-SHARED-014 (real-data verification guide) should be added as migration priority
MECH-SHARED-022 (validation results parity history) should be referenced in adjudication section
phase_2_decisions_md: Q-001: Decision needed on annual_award/annual_loss golden set requirement
Q-003: CT-003 publication contract testing should be scheduled
Q-004: GOV-02 implementation requirements should be elaborated
